issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as missing environment variables or invalid Clerk tokens.
The skill is tailored to Next.js and Express environments, limiting its applicability to other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: nextjs-protect-routes-with-middleware
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements; Response B is not provided for evaluation.

scenarios.name: nextjs-clerk-webhook-sync-user
scenarios.rationale: A covers most rubric items while B is incomplete.
